search_candidates.query: CNMA Nusantara Sejahtera Raya Tbk. laporan keuangan 2025 pdf resmi
search_candidates.title: Pendapatan tumbuh, laba bersih CNMA justru turun 3,32% pada 2025 | IDNFinancials
search_candidates.content: ## Pendapatan tumbuh, laba bersih CNMA justru turun 3,32% pada 2025. JAKARTA – Pengelola jaringan bioskop Cinema XXI PT Nusantara Sejahtera Raya Tbk (CNMA) mencatatkan laba bersih Rp704,8 miliar pada 2025, atau turun 3,3% dibandingkan periode tahun yang sama sebelumnya. Pendapatan CNMA sebenarnya masih bertumbuh 2,6% menjadi Rp5,86 triliun di 2025. Namun, beban dan biaya operasi membengkak 3,4% menjadi Rp4,8 triliun, menekan kinerja laba usaha. Direktur Utama Cinema XXI, Suryo Suherman, menjelaskan bahwa mayoritas pendapatan perseroan berasal dari penjualan tiket sebesar Rp3,6 triliun. Kemudian, penjualan makanan dan minuman tercatat mencapai Rp2 triliun, diikuti pendapatan lainnya senilai Rp298 miliar yang berasal dari iklan, platform digital, dan penyelenggaraan acara. Perseroan juga melanjutkan ekspansi dengan meresmikan 12 bioskop baru dan menambah 43 layar pada 2025, termasuk kehadiran perdana Cinema XXI di wilayah seperti Indramayu, Pematangsiantar, Magelang, Tuban, dan Kota Metro (Lampung). Hingga 31 Desember 2025, Cinema XXI telah mengoperasikan 1.388 layar di 267 bioskop yang tersebar di 56 kota dan 30 kabupaten di seluruh Indonesia.

evidence.directors: Board of Directors Board of Directors Composition Experience Suryo Suherman (52 years old). President Director since 2024, with over 25 years at Cinema XXI in various roles including Director, Commissioner, and President Commissioner. He is also Commissioner at President Director 25+ - PT Sekar Saridana and President Director at PT Harkatjaya Bumipersada. Suryo holds Bachelor’s in Finance and Economics from Boston College, U.S. Arif Suherman (47 years old). Director since 2018, responsible for operations. He is also Commissioner at PT Sekar Saridana and PT Nusantara Elang Sejahtera, and Director 20+ - Director at PT Harkatjaya Bumipersada. Arif is actively involved in YPO and KADIN. He holds Bachelor’s in International Business from Sophia University, Japan. Tri Rudy Anitio (59 years old). Director since 1997, responsible for finance and accounting. With over 35 years of experience, Tri has previously served as Tax Director 35+ - Manager at Cinema XXI and Associate at KAP Drs. B. Sudharta & Co. He holds Bachelor’s in Social Philosophy from Driyarkara School of Philosophy. Dody Suhartono (54 years old). Director since 2023, responsible for cinema operations. With over 30 years of experience, Dody spent 25 years at Cinema XXI as Chief of F&B. He also serves as Director 30+ - Director at PT Harkatjaya Bumipersada and Commissioner at PT Delta Raya Group. Dody holds degrees from Rancho Santiago College and California State University, Fullerton, U.S. Source: Company, SSI Research www.samuel.co.id Page 8 of 16 Nusantara Sejahtera Raya Tbk Bloomberg: CNMA IJ Media & Entertainment Sector 10 September 2025 JCI Index 7,628 Financial Overview Given its massive room for growth, strong balance sheet, and potential CNMA is positioned for a robust expansion initiatives, we are convinced that CNMA’s admissions may recovery post-pandemic and reach 90.7mn (+4.2% YoY) in 2025F, before reaching pre-pandemic benefits from expanding market levels, reaching 106.7mn (+8.3% YoY) in 2027F. This growth is expected share, resulting in… to drive CNMA’s top line to IDR 6.2tn (+7.7% YoY) in 2025F, and IDR 7.4tn (+9.8% YoY) in 2027F. Additionally, we believe CNMA holds a leading position in the oligopolistic market, which should allow its lease rate to remain around 8% or even lower, resulting in double-digit growth in the bottom line. We project net profit growth of +14.1% YoY to IDR 831bn in 2025F, and +17.3% YoY growth to IDR 1.1tn in 2027F. Lastly, we favor CNMA due to its healthy balance sheet, evidenced by its net cash position and a double-digit ICR of 10x in 2026F, which supports its expansion initiatives. Figure 11. evidence.commissioners: Board of Commissioners Position Experience Composition Ongki Wanadjati Dana (68 years old). President Commissioner of Cinema XXI since 2024, having previously served as Independent Commissioner in 2023. With over 40 years of experience in finance, President Ongki has held senior roles at Bank 40+ - Commissioner Universal, Bank Permata, BTPN, and others. He currently serves as Commissioner at PT Bank BTPN Tbk and PT Bank BTPN Syariah Tbk. Ongki holds Bachelor’s in Mechanical Engineering from ITB (1981). Melia Suherman (51 years old). Commissioner of Cinema XXI since 2017, with a career spanning over 25 years. Melia has had a long tenure at Cinema XXI (since 1997) and also holds Commissioner roles at Commissioner 25+ - PT Harkatjaya Bumipersada and PT Multindo Auto Finance. She earned Bachelor’s in Finance from Boston College, U.S. (1995). Harris Lasmana (76 years old). Commissioner of Cinema XXI since 2018, following an extensive career of 35+ years at the company. He served as President Director from 1988 to 2011 and President Commissioner 35+ - Commissioner from 2011 to 2018. Harris also holds the position of President Commissioner at PT Sekar Saridana and served as President Director of PT Adi Pratama Nusantara. Sacheen Harris Lasmana (49 years old). Commissioner of Cinema XXI since 2017. Director at PT Adi Pratama Nusantara since 2001 and former Government & Public Commissioner 25+ - Affairs Officer at BP Indonesia. Sacheen holds Bachelor’s and Master’s degrees in International Relations from Regent’s Park College, U.K. M.Noor Rachman Soejoeti (68 years old). Independent Commissioner since 2023, he brings over 30 years of experience in finance and capital markets. He previously served as Deputy Commissioner of Capital Independent - 35+ Market Supervision at OJK and held Commisioner commissioner roles at Maybank Asset Management, BEI, and Avia Avian. He holds Economics degrees from UGM and Colorado State University. www.samuel.co.id Page 6 of 16 Nusantara Sejahtera Raya Tbk Bloomberg: CNMA IJ Media & Entertainment Sector 10 September 2025 JCI Index 7,628 Years of Shareholding Board of Commissioners Position Experience Composition Ariani Vidya Sofjan (55 years old).Independent Commissioner since 2024, with over 27 years of experience in financial services.
